/usr/bin/c++ -g "CMakeFiles/desktop-tui.dir/src/platform/terminal_posix.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/desktop-tui.dir/src/platform/input_posix.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/desktop-tui.dir/src/ui/renderer.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/desktop-tui.dir/src/ui/panel.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/desktop-tui.dir/src/ui/text_input.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/desktop-tui.dir/src/desktop/desktop.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/desktop-tui.dir/src/desktop/desktop_manager.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/desktop-tui.dir/src/window/window.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/desktop-tui.dir/src/plugins/dynamic_plugin.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/desktop-tui.dir/src/plugins/plugin_manager.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/desktop-tui.dir/src/main.cpp.o" -o desktop-tui  -ldl
